channel.title: NPR Topics: News
channel.description: NPR news, audio, and podcasts. Coverage of breaking stories, national and world news, politics, business, science, technology, and extended coverage of major national and world events.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Pennsylvania's proposed data centers are bringing strangers together in protest
item.description: Proposals to build six data centers in the small community of Archbald, Pennsylvania, have brought strangers together to fight the plans there — and elsewhere in the state.
item.content:encoded: Proposals to build six data centers in the small community of Archbald, Pennsylvania, have brought strangers together to fight the plans there — and elsewhere in the state.
item.dc:creator: Kat Bolus

item.title: Paul Pelosi in hit-and-run in California, car left with major damage, authorities say
item.description: The husband of former House Speaker Nancy Pelosi was involved in a hit-and-run in California that left a parked car with "major" damage, authorities said Saturday.
item.content:encoded:
The husband of former House Speaker Nancy Pelosi was involved in a hit-and-run in California that left a parked car with "major" damage, authorities said Saturday.

(Image credit: Adam Gray)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Pastor freed from prison in China weeks after Trump requested his release
item.description: A pastor of a prominent underground church who was detained in China in October has been released, less than two months after U.S. President Donald Trump brought up his case when meeting Chinese leader Xi Jinping.
item.content:encoded:
A pastor of a prominent underground church who was detained in China in October has been released, less than two months after U.S. President Donald Trump brought up his case when meeting Chinese leader Xi Jinping.

(Image credit: Ng Han Guan)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: In Mount Rushmore speech, Trump veers from U.S. exceptionalism to warnings about communism
item.description: President Trump ushered in America's 250th anniversary with a darkly political speech that swerved from the typically apolitical, unifying speeches past presidents have given to mark Independence Day.
item.content:encoded:
President Trump ushered in America's 250th anniversary with a darkly political speech that swerved from the typically apolitical, unifying speeches past presidents have given to mark Independence Day.

(Image credit: Alex Brandon)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Trump addresses nation and fireworks light up National Mall after storm delay
item.description: President Trump lauded America's storied history on Saturday night in a speech marking the 250th anniversary of its independence, while also praising his war in Iran, railing against "communists," and vowing to restrict mail-in ballots.
item.content:encoded:
President Trump lauded America's storied history on Saturday night in a speech marking the 250th anniversary of its independence, while also praising his war in Iran, railing against "communists," and vowing to restrict mail-in ballots. 

(Image credit: Jose Luis Magana)
item.dc:creator: Willem Marx

item.title: Move over Chutes & Ladders: Schisto & Ladders has educational value plus worms
item.description: Spread by parasitic worms that can infect via a splash of water, schistosomiasis causes debilitating symptoms. It hits kids hard. A board game teaches how to prevent it.
item.content:encoded:
Spread by parasitic worms that can infect via a splash of water, schistosomiasis causes debilitating symptoms. It hits kids hard. A board game teaches how to prevent it.

(Image credit: Daniel Amao)
item.dc:creator: William McCarthy

item.title: China's military promotes 2 new generals after anti-corruption purge thins ranks
item.description: The shake-up is believed to be an effort to ensure the military's loyalty to the Communist Party and its leader, Xi Jinping.
item.content:encoded:
The shake-up is believed to be an effort to ensure the military's loyalty to the Communist Party and its leader, Xi Jinping.

(Image credit: Li Gang)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Opinion: America is still a work in progress
item.description: Poets like Walt Whitman and Langston Hughes have written movingly about America.
item.content:encoded:
Poets like Walt Whitman and Langston Hughes have written movingly about America.

(Image credit: J. Scott Applewhite)
item.dc:creator: Scott Simon

item.title: 'Cautiously optimistic': Swing voters describe their view of America at 250
item.description: As America turns 250, voters from our Swing Shift project talk about the state of the country. Their views ranged from "uncertain" and "concerned" to "excited" and "cautiously optimistic."
item.content:encoded:
As America turns 250, voters from our Swing Shift project talk about the state of the country. Their views ranged from "uncertain" and "concerned" to "excited" and "cautiously optimistic."

(Image credit: Illustrations by Tara Anand)
item.dc:creator: Tamara Keith

item.title: Cape Verde's historic World Cup ride ends after pushing Argentina to the brink
item.description: Cape Verde didn't win a match at the World Cup, and somehow, that didn't seem to matter. The African team's debut on this stage was unforgettable.
item.content:encoded:
Cape Verde didn't win a match at the World Cup, and somehow, that didn't seem to matter. The African team's debut on this stage was unforgettable.

(Image credit: Lynne Sladky)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press
